title: Genetics: Resequenced
description: Extract mobs' Genes to gain their powers!
body:
A modern remake of the mod [Genetics Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/genetics-reborn) (which was itself a remake of [Advanced Genetics](http://188.166.70.62/teamdna/advgen/))!

 

With this mod, you can __scrape mobs for their Genes__, processing them into any of ___**80+**___ powers, and infuse them into yourself or others!

 

Most Genes can be utilized by both players _and_ mobs, so your pets can be as powerful as you are!

 

The only supported recipe viewer is [EMI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/emi). You can [see the mod's wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/geneticsresequenced/latest) for more information, including a full list of Genes. I also have a [Discord server](https://discord.gg/AYDUAdzM24)!
